personal_info.name: AHMED NASR
personal_info.title: Executive Director, Strategic Initiatives and Digital Transformation

summary:
Strategic Initiatives executive with 20+ years architecting and delivering high-impact programs across FinTech, HealthTech, and digital platforms in the GCC and Egypt. Recognized for hands-on, content-driven work: personally developing strategic frameworks, translating senior leadership mandates into structured, actionable programs, and driving alignment across complex stakeholder ecosystems spanning governments, regulators, technology partners, and cross-sector operators.

Deep expertise in Saudi Vision 2030 digital transformation, currently leading a $50M cross-sector initiative across KSA, UAE, and Egypt. Experienced in structured growth environments: built enterprise PMO managing 300+ concurrent programs across 8 countries, and led platform expansion from 30,000 to 7 million daily transactions. Operates at the intersection of strategic decision forums and execution, serving as a principal architect of frameworks that move from mandate to measurable impact.

Core Competencies: Strategic Initiative Architecture, Cross-Sector Integration, Stakeholder Ecosystem Alignment, Executive Framework Development, Vision 2030 Program Delivery, Structured Growth Design, Senior Leadership Partnership, Actionable Program Structuring, Decision Forum Support, Enterprise PMO Governance

experience.title: PMO and Regional Engagement Lead
bullets: Architect and lead a $50M cross-sector digital transformation initiative spanning 15 hospitals across three countries, translating Board-level mandates into structured, actionable programs with measurable milestones
Developed and personally authored enterprise-level strategic frameworks for digital health transformation aligned with Saudi Vision 2030 and MOH national health objectives in KSA

Drive alignment across a complex stakeholder ecosystem including hospital C-suites, KSA Ministry of Health, international technology partners (Health Catalyst, KLAS Research), and JCI and HIMSS regulatory bodies
Serve as principal strategic content developer for senior leadership decision forums: preparing executive materials, framework documentation, and cross-sector integration roadmaps
Established enterprise PMO governance model managing 30 cross-functional professionals, structuring growth across clinical, operational, and digital domains simultaneously
Deployed 14 production AI agents in live clinical operations, representing one of the first-of-kind implementations across the GCC healthcare sector

experience.title: Country Manager
bullets: Led market entry strategy for Egypt's first comprehensive financial SuperApp, personally developing the strategic framework that integrated payments, banking, e-commerce, and lifestyle services into a single architecture
Structured and executed cross-sector partnership initiatives with major financial institutions, translating national financial inclusion mandates into actionable commercial programs
Built the initial organizational and operational framework to support phased, structured growth from concept to live market deployment
Developed all executive-level strategic content and stakeholder materials presented to Board and regulatory decision forums

experience.title: Head of E-Commerce Product and IT Strategy
bullets: Designed and led end-to-end digital transformation and IT strategy initiative, developing the strategic framework for omnichannel integration across retail, logistics, and digital platforms
Structured cross-sector programs aligning technology, commercial, and supply chain stakeholders under a unified strategic roadmap

experience.title: Product Development Manager
bullets: Led strategic product initiatives during hypergrowth phase: platform scaled from 30,000 to 7 million daily orders (233x growth), driven by structured cross-market programs and stakeholder alignment across Berlin HQ, GCC country teams, and Egypt operations
Chaired the Operations Excellence Committee, serving as the cross-sector coordination forum for senior leadership decisions spanning product, operations, and regional markets
Personally developed strategic frameworks and performance materials presented to senior leadership at regional and global decision forums
Implemented lean methodologies to translate high-level growth mandates into actionable product and operational programs across cross-functional teams

experience.title: PMO Section Head
bullets: Built enterprise PMO from the ground up, designing the governance framework that structured 300+ concurrent banking and payments programs across 8 countries
Developed the directive PMO framework and initiative architecture model adopted across the organization, enabling structured growth at scale for 300+ banking clients worldwide
Recruited, trained, and led a team of 16 Project Managers, personally developing all strategic templates, standards, and executive reporting content for senior leadership review

experience.title: Senior Project Manager and IT Section Head
bullets: Led technology delivery and strategic initiative management across the telecoms sector, developing project frameworks and stakeholder alignment processes adopted organization-wide
